pivot_reason: The seven incremental lane-94 SHAs yielded no structurally and runtime-safe LB probe.
candidate_correctness_evidence: known 265/265 in disabled/default plus two independent 5000/5000 fresh runs in each mode

legal_rewrite_analysis.rewrite: non-negative Conv to width 30 followed by Slice/negative-Pad crop to width 6
legal_rewrite_analysis.result: schema-compliant but the charged full-width float carrier raises cost above the target

legal_rewrite_analysis.result: schema-compliant but every Split output is charged

reason: The only <=370 representation found relies on negative Conv padding; all legal equivalents measured or bounded exceed the authority cost.
